plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Fetch current library documentation in Codex
plugins.longDescription: Context7 adds current, version-aware library documentation and code examples to Codex through the Context7 MCP server.
plugins.author: Upstash

plugins.name: cowart
plugins.description: Create, annotate, and generate on a local infinite canvas in Codex.
plugins.longDescription: Cowart brings a tldraw-powered infinite canvas into Codex for visual planning and creative iteration. Open a local canvas for the active project, sketch ideas, place AI image holders, generate images into selected slots, and turn annotated screenshots into revised image outputs while keeping canvas data in the user's project workspace.
plugins.author: ZHONG XIN

plugins.name: email-protocols-rust
plugins.description: Rust backend for standard IMAP/POP3 email accounts
plugins.longDescription: Preview implementation of the Email Protocols MCP server in Rust. It provides mail_open_config_ui for a local setup page where users enter an email account, email client app password, provider, and default protocol. It preserves the existing IMAP/SMTP and POP3/SMTP tool names, schemas, dynamic protocol-aware tool exposure, and stable business error shape. GitHub source installs include the Windows x64 runtime at ./bin/email-protocols-mcp.exe; plugin users do not need Rust or Cargo.
plugins.author: MWE Support
